overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a vehicle journey through a futuristic city. The clip transitions from covered elevated highways with artificial lighting to open sunlit roads and dense urban corridors with neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated highway with yellow safety barriers and overhead neon lighting

bright yellow concrete barriers lining both sides of the road
linear fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel interior
futuristic vehicle interior with green illuminated instruments and red accents
small decorative figure mounted on the dashboard

segments.scene_description: The segment shows first-person driving through an enclosed highway tunnel with artificial lighting. Yellow safety barriers line both sides of the multi-lane road, while overhead lights cast a warm glow. The futuristic car dashboard is visible with green instrument panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway with distant city skyline views

events.description: exiting covered tunnel into bright sunlight causing lens flare and sudden illumination

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto open highway while adjusting to bright sunlight

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: clear blue sky visible after exiting the tunnel
bright sunlight creating lens flare effects on the windshield
futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon
silver metal safety barriers replacing the yellow concrete walls

segments.scene_description: The vehicle emerges from the covered highway into bright daylight, revealing an open elevated highway with metal guardrails. The sun creates significant glare on the windshield as the distant cyberpunk city skyline becomes visible ahead. Sparse vegetation appears on the roadside embankments.

events.description: entering shadow cast by concrete overpass ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed while passing through brief shaded section

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure casting shadow over the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle briefly passes under a concrete overpass, plunging the scene into shadow. The lighting shifts dramatically from bright sunlight to dim artificial ambiance before quickly returning to daylight on the other side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway through dense cyberpunk urban district with holographic advertisements

events.description: entering dense urban canyon with towering glass skyscrapers and neon signage

agents.ego_description: cruising through elevated highway surrounded by futuristic city architecture

notable_agents.action: red sports car maintaining distance ahead in traffic

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with reflective glass facades lining the highway
large holographic advertisements including 'NICOLA' signage and brand logos
tall concrete highway barriers with metal fencing
overhead directional signs and route markers

segments.scene_description: The highway opens into a dense cyberpunk urban canyon with towering glass skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards. The vehicle continues on the elevated roadway surrounded by futuristic architecture, neon signage, and light traffic. The scene features vibrant neon colors against the bright daylight with detailed futuristic city elements visible in all directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a confined artificial tunnel into the sprawling, sun-drenched expanse of a futuristic metropolis. It begins within an enclosed highway tunnel where warm overhead lights reflect off yellow safety barriers and a green-lit dashboard. As the vehicle emerges from the cover, the scene opens into bright daylight on an elevated highway, where intense sun glare on the windshield reveals a distant cyberpunk skyline and sparse roadside vegetation. The camera then briefly plunges into shadow while passing under a concrete overpass before bursting back into the light. Finally, the roadway expands into a dense urban canyon, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards that blend vibrant neon signage with the bright daylight.
